total_workers.description: Total number of welfare workers employed by the agency, used as the population size in the probability calculation (denominator of P(A)=3/10).

illegal_workers.description: Number of workers who have regularly been giving illegal deductions, used as the count of 'success' items in the population (numerator of P(A)=3/10).

workers_selected.description: Number of workers randomly selected by the supervisor for auditing, defining the two-step selection process in the multiplicative rule.
